MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Feb-25-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EAN HOLDINGS, LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication.

The motion is granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for moving party is required to prepare a proposed order which is verbatim to the Court's ruling and also states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
